basic_details.job_title: IIT ISM Dhanbad Project Associate II Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: IIT (ISM) Dhanbad is recruiting 02 Project Associate-II posts for the Abhikalp HRMS development project. This is a great opportunity for candidates with strong web development background to work on an in-house enterprise system in a prestigious IIT.

important_dates.interview_date: To be informed to shortlisted candidates

qualification.details: criteria: Details | age limit: As per Government of India Norms (Relaxation applicable as per rules)
qualification.education_qualification: MCA, M.Sc (IT), M.Sc (M&C), M.Sc (CS) or equivalent with minimum 2 years relevant experience. OR BCA, B.Sc (IT), B.Sc (M&C), B.Sc (CS) or equivalent with minimum 4 years relevant experience.
qualification.experience: Relevant experience in web application development is mandatory

selection_process: Candidates will be shortlisted based on their academic qualifications

and merit. Shortlisted candidates will be called for an Interview. Final selection is subject to performance in the interview and verification of original documents. Mere fulfillment of minimum qualifications does not guarantee an interview call.
how_to_apply: Fill the Google Form carefully with all required details.
Upload necessary documents (if asked) and submit before the deadline.
Keep a copy of the submitted application for future reference.
Queries: Send email to Prof. Saurabh Srivastava at [email protected]
important_instructions: This is a purely temporary project-based position. No claim for regular appointment in IIT (ISM) Dhanbad after completion. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. Candidates must make their own arrangements for travel and stay in Dhanbad. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. The institute reserves the right to cancel or modify the recruitment process at any stage.

content_sections.heading: IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Project Associate Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: Indian Institute of Technology (ISM) Dhanbad, Office of the Dean (Research & Development) has officially released the notification for engagement of 02 Project Associate-II positions under Sanction No. DRD/PROJECT/0239/2025-26 dated August 14, 2025 and IIT (ISM) Project No. MISC 0239. The project is titled “CONTINUOUS DEVELOPMENT & ENRICHMENT OF ABHIKALP” – the in-house HRMS Solution of the institute. Download IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Project Associate Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Project Associate Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: IIT (ISM) Dhanbad is recruiting 02 Project Associate-II posts for the Abhikalp HRMS development project. This is a great opportunity for candidates with strong web development background to work on an in-house enterprise system in a prestigious IIT.

rows.indian_institute_of_technology_ism_dhanb: 3 Years or End of Project, whichever is earlier

content_sections.heading: IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Project Associate Recruitment 2026 Important Dates

rows.event: Last Date for Submission of Application

rows.date: To be informed to shortlisted candidates

content_sections.heading: IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Project Associate Recruitment 2026 Job Description
content_sections.text: Design, Development & Upgradation of Abhikalp – the in-house Human Resource Management System (HRMS) of IIT (ISM) Dhanbad. Candidates will be involved in full-stack development, feature enhancement, maintenance, and implementation of new modules using modern web technologies.

content_sections.heading: IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Project Associate Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria

rows.details: MCA, M.Sc (IT), M.Sc (M&C), M.Sc (CS) or equivalent with minimum 2 years relevant experience. OR BCA, B.Sc (IT), B.Sc (M&C), B.Sc (CS) or equivalent with minimum 4 years relevant experience.
1. Strong knowledge of React.js 2. Proficiency in Laravel PHP Framework 3. Experience with MariaDB / MySQL 4. Understanding of Microservices architecture and web development concepts
As per Government of India Norms (Relaxation applicable as per rules)
Relevant experience in web application development is mandatory

content_sections.heading: IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Project Associate Recruitment 2026 Fellowship Details
content_sections.text: Selected candidates will receive a consolidated fellowship of Rs. 28,000/- per month + 16% House Rent Allowance (HRA), totaling approximately Rs. 32,480/- per month.

content_sections.heading: IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Project Associate Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Candidates will be shortlisted based on their academic qualifications, experience, and merit. Shortlisted candidates will be called for an Interview. Final selection is subject to performance in the interview and verification of original documents. Mere fulfillment of minimum qualifications does not guarantee an interview call.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Project Associate Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the official application link. Fill the Google Form carefully with all required details. Upload necessary documents (if asked) and submit before the deadline. Keep a copy of the submitted application for future reference. Direct Application Link: https://forms.gle/Ztjq84mixMJajwUb6 Queries: Send email to Prof. Saurabh Srivastava at [email protected]

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: This is a purely temporary project-based position. No claim for regular appointment in IIT (ISM) Dhanbad after completion. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. Candidates must make their own arrangements for travel and stay in Dhanbad. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. The institute reserves the right to cancel or modify the recruitment process at any stage.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date for IIT ISM Dhanbad Project Associate-II Application 2026?
faq.answer: The last date is 22 July 2026 (11:59 PM).

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are released for Project Associate at IIT Dhanbad 2026?
faq.answer: Total 02 positions of Project Associate-II are available.

faq.question: Q3. What is the monthly salary for Project Associate-II in IIT ISM Dhanbad?
faq.answer: Rs. 28,000 + 16% HRA = Rs. 32,480 per month.

faq.question: Q4. What qualifications are required for IIT Dhanbad Project Associate Recruitment?
faq.answer: MCA/M.Sc with 2 years experience or BCA/B.Sc with 4 years relevant experience.

faq.question: Q5. Is this a permanent job at IIT (ISM) Dhanbad?
faq.answer: No, it is a temporary project position for up to 3 years.

faq.question: Q6. What technologies are preferred for Abhikalp Project at IIT ISM?
faq.answer: React.js, Laravel PHP, MariaDB, and Microservices concepts.

faq.question: Q7. How to apply for IIT ISM Dhanbad Project Associate 2026?
faq.answer: Apply only through the official Google Form: https://forms.gle/Ztjq84mixMJajwUb6

faq.question: Q8. Will there be a written exam for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No written exam. Selection is through shortlisting and personal interview.

faq.question: Q9. Who is the Principal Investigator for this project?
faq.answer: Prof. Saurabh Srivastava

faq.question: Q10. Is prior experience mandatory for IIT Dhanbad Project Associate post?
faq.answer: Yes, minimum 2 years (for PG) or 4 years (for UG) relevant experience is required.
